 /lightgreen/Guard/. **RESEARCH DRIVE**: Gains /red/+2 ATK/ #atk# at the end of each turn — the lab never closes. If [[Marija]] is on the board, also gains /lightgreen/+1 Max HP/ #hp# each turn — her mother's presence steadies her nerves and sharpens her focus.

description:
